mapper.select: SELECT * FROM permission ORDER BY parent_id ASC, sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT p.* FROM permission p INNER JOIN role_permission rp ON p.id = rp.permission_id WHERE rp.role_id = #{roleId} ORDER BY p.parent_id ASC, p.sort_order ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO permission (parent_id, code, name, type, sort_order) VALUES (#{parentId}, #{code}, #{name}, #{type}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.update: UPDATE permission SET parent_id = #{parentId}, code = #{code}, name = #{name}, type = #{type}, sort_order = #{sortOrder} WHERE id = #{id}
